title: SPECIALIZED VIRTUAL THERAPY FOR ADULTS IN FREDERICKSBURG, CHARLOTTESVILLE, AND ACROSS VIRGINIA

blocks.hero_title: Thoughtful Therapy That Meets You Where You Are.
blocks.hero_subtitle: SPECIALIZED VIRTUAL THERAPY FOR ADULTS IN FREDERICKSBURG, CHARLOTTESVILLE, AND ACROSS VIRGINIA

items.subtitle: Consistency Over Distance
items.text: Access specialized trauma care from Fredericksburg, Charlottesville, or anywhere in Virginia without the hours of drive time.

items.subtitle: Life-Proof Flexibility
items.text: Transition to a virtual session when a sick child, work emergency, or Virginia weather makes getting to the office impossible.

items.subtitle: Your Own Sanctuary
items.text: Engage in deep work like EMDR or IFS from the environment where you feel most secure.

blocks.subtitle: High-Touch Therapy, Designed for Your Life

blocks.body:
You know that sinking feeling when you realize you have to cancel therapy again because your kid is sick, work exploded, or the roads are a nightmare?

That pattern of canceling and rescheduling kills momentum. Your nervous system doesn't regulate in fits and starts. Trauma work requires consistency. And life is designed to destroy consistency.

That's where virtual therapy becomes your backup plan instead of your barrier.
blocks.subtitle: When Life (or Distance) Gets in the Way

blocks.title: How We Use Virtual Sessions Strategically
blocks.body:
I specialize in trauma-informed care that prioritizes deep connection. While being in the same room offers unique nuances, modern telehealth allows us to maintain a similar level of attunement from a distance.

We utilize virtual sessions to ensure your work never stalls:

* *For Local Clients:* We default to in-person sessions, but seamlessly pivot to virtual when life gets messy (e.g., sick kids, travel, or high-stress days where leaving home between work commitments is too much).
* *For Long-Distance Clients:* For those joining me from Fredericksburg, Charlottesville, Richmond, or other parts of Virginia, virtual sessions allow us to work together regardless of the miles. It means you can choose the therapist that feels like the right fit for your story, without letting a 2-hour (plus) drive dictate your care.

blocks.subtitle: Why This Flexibility Actually Matters
blocks.body:
Therapy only works if you show up. And showing up gets exponentially harder when life is already overwhelming you.

The clients who make real progress aren't the ones with perfect schedules. They're the ones who adapt when life gets messy instead of abandoning therapy entirely.

Virtual sessions have a different rhythm. But they're better than canceling. Better than losing weeks of momentum. Better than letting your nervous system destabilize because you couldn't make it to the office.

blocks.subtitle: What Virtual Sessions Can't Do
blocks.body:
I won't pretend it's the same as in-person therapy. It's not.

Screen-based sessions miss subtle body language. Co-regulation is harder through a camera. Technology glitches at the worst moments. Privacy at home isn't always guaranteed.

Some trauma work genuinely needs in-person presence. If we're doing deep somatic work or intensive nervous system regulation, we need to be in the room together. Virtual has limits.

But for maintaining consistency, processing recent events, or navigating immediate stressors? Virtual keeps you connected to the work when in-person isn't possible or is just plain inconvenient.

blocks.subtitle: How This Works in Practice
blocks.body:
We meet in person as your default. That's where the deepest work happens.

When life interferes, we switch to virtual for that session. You stay on track. We address what's happening. Then we return to in-person when circumstances allow.

This isn't about choosing virtual or in-person. It's about having both options so consistency doesn't become another thing life takes from you.

*For clients living further afield in Virginia, we design a custom hybrid or fully virtual plan that ensures you receive deep, consistent care without the burden of travel.*
blocks.image_alt: image of wood desk and computer screen in soft-lit office with table lamp on and large fig tree with basked filled with pillows

blocks.title: Ready to Start?
blocks.body:
If in-person trauma therapy with the flexibility to adapt when life gets chaotic sounds like what you need, let's talk.

Schedule your free 15-minute consultation call to see if we're a good fit. We'll discuss your specific situation, what you're working on, and how we can build consistency into your healing process even when life refuses to cooperate.
